skill_availability_goal: Verify release-mode reconciliation of only affected product and ops current-state pages against confirmed v1.5.0 facts.
prompt: 按 `release-handoff.md` 的已确认 v1.5.0 release 范围同步仍受影响的 product 与 ops 正式页面。请核对 release scope、版本证据、实现/配置、测试和审计上下文，只更新 change map 命中的页面，执行宿主 `npm run test:docs`，再输出 #117 handoff。不要生成或编辑 Release Notes。
